Resources

Learn, launch and grow. All from one place.

Guides, templates, product updates and setup resources for teams building their workspace around CSorro OS.

Guides

Workspace setup, project structure, storage permissions, studio review and team onboarding.

Templates

Business, agency, creator, client portal, production, CRM and reporting workspace templates.

Roadmap & updates

Follow what is shipping next: live auth, storage, CRM, studio review, reports, invoices and CORE AI.

Help centre

Support articles and practical setup help for new users, guests, clients and workspace owners.

Community

Share workflows, request modules and see how other teams set up their operating system.

API later

Future integrations for automations, reporting, billing, storage and external business tools.
